name: Easy Chili Con Carne
recipeIngredient: 1 Can red kidney beans (15-1/2 ounces), undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef, onion, and garlic in a 3-quart saucepan, stirring occasionally, until the beef is brown. Drain.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the beans. Break up the tomatoes.
3. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the beans. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat.
6. Simmer uncovered about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until of desired thickness.
4 SERVINGS; 415 CALORIES PER SERVING.
